overview.description: The ProShares Ultra Silver (AGQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Dow Jones-UBS Silver Sub-Index index. The fund provides 2x the daily performance of an index of silver future contracts. AGQ was launched on Dec 1, 2008 and is issued by ProShares.
